parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  userId: Number($node["Parser Routine JSON"].json.userId || 0),
  analysis: String($node["Parser Routine JSON"].json.analysis || ''),
  analysisHash: String($node["Parser Routine JSON"].json.analysisHash || ''),
  score: Number($node["Parser Routine JSON"].json.score || 0),
  quizAnswers: $node["Parser Routine JSON"].json.answers || [],
  routine: $node["Parser Routine JSON"].json.generatedRoutine,
  upsert: true,
  source: 'n8n-routine-generator',
  idempotencyKey: String($node["Parser Routine JSON"].json.idempotencyKey || '')
} }}
